executive_summary.overview: Anglepoint conducted an IBM Risk & Opportunity Assessment for UPS, covering up to 250 IBM products across 70,000 servers, 270,000 workstations, and 5 physical mainframes. The engagement identified $8.9M in total optimization potential through cost avoidance and savings opportunities, with full remediation of $1.08M in identified compliance risks.
key_accomplishments: Achieved 100% cost avoidance on $1.08M identified compliance risk across 8 IBM products, reducing remaining risk to $0
Identified $3.59M in potential cost savings from sub-capacity products with low utilization rates (0%-63%)
Identified $2.56M in potential cost savings from non-ILMT products with underutilization
Discovered 115 total IBM distributed products with more licenses than in use, representing $7.81M optimization opportunity
Tracked deployment trends showing significant reduction in IBM ODM Server (23,400 to 7,420 units) yielding $858K savings value

key_metrics.label: Total Optimization Identified
key_metrics.context: Combined cost avoidance and savings potential over 1-year period

key_metrics.label: Identified Risk
key_metrics.context: Financial impact from under or incorrectly licensed IBM software

key_metrics.label: Cost Avoidance Accomplished
key_metrics.context: Full risk remediation achieved with $0 remaining risk

key_metrics.label: Sub-Capacity Cost Savings
key_metrics.context: Potential savings from 23 products with excess licenses

key_metrics.label: Non-ILMT Cost Savings
key_metrics.context: Potential savings from 75 products with underutilization

key_metrics.label: Products with Excess Licenses
key_metrics.context: IBM distributed products found with more licenses than deployed

recommendations: Remove 23 IBM sub-capacity products with excess licenses from upcoming renewal if no growth plans exist ($2.34M savings potential) - Target: June 30, 2025
Validate and remove 17 sub-capacity products with active S&S but 0 deployments from renewal ($2.91M savings potential) - Target: June 30, 2025
Review 43 non-ILMT products with excess licenses for renewal reduction ($1.82M savings potential) - Target: June 30, 2025
Confirm usage and remove 32 non-ILMT products with active S&S and 0 deployments ($743K savings potential) - Target: June 30, 2025
Validate deployments for products showing 0% utilization including IBM Storage Suite, IBM Sterling Family, and IBM Cognos Analytics for Non-Production
Schedule WatsonX Implementation with product stakeholders as next strategic initiative
primary_risks: IBM InfoSphere DataStage Linux for System z under-licensing exposure of $339,517 (remediated)
IBM WebSphere Application Server Network Deployment compliance gap of $303,635 (remediated)
IBM DB2 Enterprise Server Edition deployment increased from 43,280 to 46,800 units, adding $107K in additional license value required
Multiple products with 0% utilization require deployment validation to confirm accurate reporting
market_risks: ELA Renewal deadline of June 30, 2025 requires immediate decision on license quantities for all products on ELA
IASP (US/Canada) ELP Delivery to IBM due July 31, 2025 for all sub-capacity products covered under IASP
IBM Cloud Pak for Business Automation at 36.59% utilization with $768K savings potential indicates possible over-provisioning
additional_insights: IBM ODM Server deployment decreased dramatically from 23,400 to 7,420 units, representing $858K in realized value
IBM MQ deployment reduced from 292,280 to 266,700 units, yielding $85K in license value reduction
6 products showed deployment increases over the past year, adding incremental licensing costs of approximately $136K
Reducing renewals not recommended for products with utilization over 60% per Anglepoint methodology
26 ACEL revenue placeholder products identified in ELA for subscription and support tracking
next_steps: Implement cost savings recommendations by June 30, 2025 to capture renewal optimization
Schedule WatsonX Implementation with product stakeholders
Begin Non-PVU data collection to work towards annual baseline establishment
Register and track risk remediation and opportunity realization in Elevate platform
Report realized cost savings and avoidance in upcoming Quarterly Service Review
